items.prompt: Ctrl+R in a typical bash session starts…
choices: Recursive delete of the current directory
items.explain: Ctrl+R is reverse-search: type a substring to find an older command.

choices: Deletes all files older than a day
Lists numbered past commands from the shell history
items.explain: history prints numbered entries you can recall or re-run carefully.
Bang-bang expands to the last command—use carefully on destructive lines.

choices: Recalls the previous command for editing or re-run
items.explain: Up/down step through history so you can edit and re-run.
